name: stackra/user
purpose: Per-Application user projection — User (Identity × Application × Tenant), Profile PII satellite, and TenantMember pivot for cross-tenant membership.
capabilities: User Eloquent model on sanctum guard, application-scoped
Profile 1:1 PII satellite (name, phone, avatar, locale, tz)
TenantMember pivot linking a User to a Tenant + Role
when_to_use: Every request that authenticates a tenant-audience caller resolves through a User row here.
when_not_to_use: For the global credential record (email + password + MFA), reach for the sibling stackra/identity package.
